data.raceName: STEVIE REDBACK PEST CONTROL PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. ILLBEWATCHING has been competitive of late and kept the ball rolling last time when 6 metres from the winner in fifth over 1780m at this track. No excuses from this advantageous draw. Stepping up a level this time but on his best form he is capable of another big performance. 2. TIGER TOMMY was in the money two starts ago then things went amiss last start when she broke and finished 15 metres away in eighth over 1660m at Albion Park. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position. Only needs to get things right to be in contention. 4. MULLUM DOC is going well and is a player again off a last-start win by a neck at this track over 1780m. 1. JO ROCKS can be competitive from the ace draw.","runners":[3,2,4,1],"exclusive":false}
